description: Standard: draft with multiple style issues

input.draft: The number of incidents at the facility have increased by 25 percent since January, according to data from the Bureau of Labor statistics. Dr. Amanda Chen, who is a professor at Eastfield university, says the trend is concerning. "We are seeing systemic failures," she said, "that point to a fundamental disregard for worker safety". The company, which employs roughly 3500 workers at its main campus, declined to comment. Three workers were hospitalised last month; two have since been released, and one remains in critical condition.
The project is expected to be completed by March 2027, said the project manager.

The Labour government's decision to re-nationalise the railways has been met with mixed reactions. Transport Secretary David Holmes said it was a "long overdue correction." The C.B.I. warned of costs running to £20bn over a decade. Rail workers' union RMT welcomed the move but said it did not go far enough. The first franchises are expected to be brought under public control by 2027, starting with those whose contracts expire soonest. Holmes, who was appointed to the role last September, denied the policy was ideologically motivated.
